dashboard.label: Model Usage And Cost
dashboard.description: Structured metrics and traces for model usage, operational cost estimates, latency, and queue-pressure investigation.

html.h2: Model usage and cost from metrics and traces
html.p: This page is now backed by structured metrics and traces. The current usage and cost story is event-indexed and local: token usage, operational cost estimates, run duration, queue pressure, and correlated traces. It is not a billing-authoritative or full distributed-tracing surface.

panel.title: Token and cost by provider and model

search.query: `openclaw_metrics_base` | search metric_name="openclaw.tokens" OR metric_name="openclaw.cost.usd" | stats sum(metric_value) as total_value by metric_name provider model | sort - total_value | head 20

panel.title: Run duration and queue wait by provider and model

search.query: `openclaw_duration_metrics` | stats avg(metric_value) as avg_metric_value max(metric_value) as max_metric_value by metric_name provider model | sort - max_metric_value | head 20
`openclaw_queue_pressure_metrics` | stats max(metric_value) as max_metric_value values(unit) as units by metric_name run_id session_id | sort - max_metric_value | head 20
`openclaw_usage_traces` | table timestamp span_name trace_id span_id run_id session_id duration_ms provider model status | sort - timestamp | head 20
`openclaw_high_cost_or_slow_runs` | table run_id session_id session_key cost_usd run_duration_ms queue_wait_ms providers models | head 20
`openclaw_usage_traces` | stats count avg(duration_ms) as avg_duration_ms max(duration_ms) as max_duration_ms by span_name status | sort - count | head 20
